report.summary: Cycle-close: Production at e3f63fc (2 days old). 137 uncommitted files (+12 since last cycle). 711 published slugs (+15), 1 of 4 tool pages promoted. All 6 API routes structurally present but 0/6 have rate limiting. Deploy debt remains sole P0 blocker.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 1,251 page.tsx files in src/app — unchanged from prior cycle
711 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 696 — 15 new entries added in uncommitted changes)
111 phantom slugs (published without page.tsx) — unchanged, mostly dynamic-route learn/blog/course pages
No 'use client' + metadata export conflicts on any of 8 recently modified pages — build pattern stable
sentiment-heatmap promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES since last cycle; token-radar, risk-score, market-recap still NOT published (3 of 4 carry-over remain)
137 uncommitted files: 20 modified tracked + 117 untracked (reports, OG SVGs, design artifacts, docs)
Live site HTTP 200 verification blocked by sandbox egress proxy — cannot confirm production page health

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 API route files present and structurally verified:
/api/prices — 15 cache refs, 1 fallback ref, ISR revalidate=60 — healthiest route
/api/trending — 10 cache refs, 0 fallback — missing hardcoded fallback data
/api/fear-greed — 9 cache refs, 0 fallback — missing hardcoded fallback data
/api/market-metrics — 11 cache refs, 0 fallback — missing hardcoded fallback data
/api/market-dominance — 15 cache refs, 4 fallback refs — solid with FALLBACK_DATA for 8 coins
/api/defi-yields — 2 cache refs, 0 fallback, delegates to lib/defillama — most fragile route
CRITICAL: 0 of 6 API routes implement rate limiting (checkRateLimit) — all exposed to abuse
External API live health unverifiable from sandbox (egress blocked)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest committed deploy: e3f63fc — 2 days ago (was 5 days in prior report — time discrepancy suggests intermediate deploys or clock difference)
137 uncommitted files (up from 125 last cycle — 12 new files accumulated this cycle)
Build config stable: output=standalone, trailingSlash=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false
Middleware verified: Edge-compatible, inline PILLAR_PAGES, security headers intact
No new commits since e3f63fc — all work trapped in uncommitted state
CRITICAL: Deploy needed to push 15+ new published page entries and tool/learn updates to production

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA SINCE LAST CYCLE: +15 published slugs (696→711), +12 uncommitted files (125→137), 1 tool page promoted (sentiment-heatmap)
STILL BLOCKED: All content registry-only — nothing reaches production without commit + deploy
CARRY-OVER P0: Commit 137 files + Vercel deploy — production frozen since e3f63fc
CARRY-OVER P1: Add FALLBACK_DATA to 4 API routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields)
CARRY-OVER P1: Add rate limiting to all 6 API routes (currently 0/6 protected)
CARRY-OVER P1: Promote 3 remaining tool pages to PUBLISHED_PAGES (token-radar, risk-score, market-recap)
CARRY-OVER P2: Scaffold page.tsx for phantom slugs (111 published without page.tsx)
BLOCKERS NEEDING JEFE: Deploy authorization remains the sole blocker for all accumulated work
